Privacy Terms
Privacy Policy|Terms of Service
© 2026 AI Dartboard Scorer. All rights reserved.
Privacy Policy|Terms of Service

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 21 May 2026

AI Dartboard Scorer ABN 32300992377. ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal information in accordance with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth) and the Australian Privacy Principles (APPs).

1. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of personal information:

  • Contact details you submit via our enquiry form (name, email, phone number, message)
  • Order details including your name, delivery address, and transaction information processed securely via Square
  • Technical information such as browser type, device type, and referring URL (collected automatically by our hosting provider)

2. How We Use Your Information

We use your personal information to:

  • Respond to your enquiries and provide the services you request
  • Process your orders and arrange fulfilment
  • Comply with legal obligations

3. Disclosure of Your Information

We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties. We may disclose your information to:

  • Square Australia — for secure payment processing. Square's privacy policy applies to payment data.
  • Our hosting provider and IT service suppliers who assist in operating this website, under strict confidentiality obligations
  • Law enforcement or regulatory bodies where required by law

4. Data Storage and Security

Your personal information is stored securely and protected by reasonable technical and organisational measures. While we take all reasonable precautions, no data transmission over the internet can be guaranteed as completely secure.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of personal information we hold about you. To make a request, contact us at raatzy@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

6. Cookies

This website may use cookies and similar technologies to improve your browsing experience. You can disable cookies in your browser settings, though some features may not function as intended.

7. Links to Other Websites

Our website may contain links to external sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of those sites.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The current version will always be available on this page.

9. Contact Us

For any privacy-related enquiries or complaints, please contact us at:
AI Dartboard Scorer
Forest Lake, Queensland, Australia · raatzy@gmail.com
raatzy@gmail.com

If you are not satisfied with our response, you may contact the Office of the Australian Information Commissioner (OAIC) at www.oaic.gov.au.

Terms of Service

Last updated: 21 May 2026

Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using https://aidartbot.com (the "Site") operated by AI Dartboard Scorer ABN 32300992377. ("we", "us", "our").

By accessing or using this Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use this Site.

1. Use of This Website

You may use this Site for lawful purposes only. You must not use this Site in any way that breaches applicable laws or regulations, or that is fraudulent or harmful.

2. Intellectual Property

All content on this Site — including text, images, logos, and graphics — is owned by or licensed to AI Dartboard Scorer and is protected by Australian copyright law. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.

3. Services and Accuracy

The information on this Site is provided in good faith and for general informational purposes only. We make no representations or warranties about the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of this information for any particular purpose.

Online Orders

By placing an order through this Site, you agree that all information you provide is accurate. We reserve the right to cancel orders at our discretion. Payments are processed securely via Square. Refund and return policies are available on request.

4. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, AI Dartboard Scorer excludes all liability for any loss or damage arising from your use of this Site or any information on it, including but not limited to indirect, incidental, or consequential loss.

Nothing in these Terms excludes any rights you may have under the Australian Consumer Law.

5. Third-Party Links

This Site may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience only. We have no control over third-party sites and accept no responsibility for their content or privacy practices.

6. Privacy

Your use of this Site is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference.

7. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of Australia. Any disputes will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Australia.

8. Changes to These Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. The current version will always be available on this page. Continued use of the Site after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

9. Contact

If you have questions about these Terms, contact us at:
AI Dartboard Scorer
Forest Lake, Queensland, Australia · raatzy@gmail.com
raatzy@gmail.com
